title: Smarter Inspections Powered by Google Gemini Robotics | Boston Dynamics
title_zh: 由 Google Gemini Robotics 驱动的更智能检测 | Boston Dynamics
abstract:
The introduction of AI Visual inspections expanded what Spot and Orbit could tell you about  your facility - now, AIVI-Learning powered by Google Gemini Robotics unlocks a whole new level of visual  intelligence for your robot. 

Learn more about the announcement: https://bostondynamics.com/blog/aivi-learning-now-powered-google-gemini-robotics/

Check out more from Google Deepmind: https://deepmind.google/blog/gemini-robotics-er-1-6
abstract_zh: AI 视觉检测的引入扩展了 Spot 和 Orbit 能告诉你的关于设施的信息——现在，由 Google Gemini Robotics 驱动的 AIVI-Learning 为你的机器人解锁了全新的视觉智能水平。了解更多关于此公告的信息：https://bostondynamics.com/blog/aivi-learning-now-powered-google-gemini-robotics/ 查看更多来自 Google Deepmind 的内容：https://deepmind.google/blog/gemini-robotics-er-1-6
tldr_zh: Google Gemini Robotics 赋能 Spot 机器人实现更智能的视觉检测。
cover_zh: 机器人也能自学检测？Gemini 加持的 Spot 更聪明了
